---
title: "News"
description: "Research updates, visits, presentations, and academic milestones."
---

<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

## 2026

**November**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Research Visit — University of Cambridge

Planned research visit to the Department of Applied Mathematics and Theoretical Physics (DAMTP).

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

**August**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Statistics Day, Lund University

Presented the talk **Kernel Regression with Boundary Constraints**.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

**May**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Research Visit — Linköping University

Visited the Department of Scientific Computing.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

## 2025

**November**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Research Visit — Linköping University

Visited the Department of Scientific Computing.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

**August**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Isaac Newton Institute, Cambridge

Presented the poster **Preconditioning Radial Basis Functions Using Semi-Group Operators** at the *Workshop on Early Career Pioneers in UQ and AI*.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

**June**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Research Visit — Uppsala University

Visited the Department of Scientific Computing.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

## 2024

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### CWI Amsterdam

Presented the poster **Systems Identification Using Random Feature Neural Networks** at the *Workshop on Scientific Machine Learning*.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

## 2023

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### SIAM CSE, Amsterdam

Presented the poster **Full Waveform Inversion Using Neural Operators**.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

## 2022

**August**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### DFTK Summer School, Paris

Participated in the DFTK Summer School.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

**May**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### International Supercomputing Conference, Hamburg

Student volunteer.

</div>
</div>

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-date">

## 2021

**June**

</div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Forschungszentrum Jülich

Participated in the Guest Student Program.

</div>
</div>

</div>
